title: Xtra Crispy Welsh Cornmeal Sunday Roast
description: A hearty one-pot Welsh roast with a crunchy cornmeal crust and seasonal vegetables.
instructions: Rub the pork roast with olive oil, salt, pepper, thyme, rosemary, and minced garlic.
Toss the cornmeal with a pinch of salt; coat the roast completely with the cornmeal.
Place the coated roast in a roasting pan and surround it with carrots, potatoes, and onion.
Pour the broth into the pan, ensuring it reaches halfway up the roast.
Roast uncovered for 45 minutes, basting occasionally with pan juices.
Increase oven temperature to 200°C and roast for an additional 30 minutes until the crust is golden and the internal temperature reaches 70°C.
Remove the pan from the oven and let the roast rest for 10 minutes before slicing.
Serve the sliced roast on a bed of the roasted vegetables, drizzling with pan juices.
Sprinkle fresh herbs such as parsley or chives for a herbal finish.
